notes: Compound noun: Herz (heart) + Frequenz (frequency). Often used in medical and fitness contexts. Synonym: Herzschlagrate, Pulsfrequenz.

sentences.german: Beim Sport steigt die Herzfrequenz stark an.
sentences.english: During exercise, the heart rate increases significantly.

sentences.german: Der Arzt hat meine Herzfrequenz gemessen und sie war normal.
sentences.english: The doctor measured my heart rate and it was normal.
